category_errors.title: Software install request failed
category_errors.predicted_issue_text: Installer says no permission for approved software request.
category_errors.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The software install failed because the package deployment scope did not include the device. Correcting the deployment restored installation. The user expressed urgency during the conversation.
category_errors.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Application not targeted correctly. Fix: Assigned package properly, installation finished without errors.
category_errors.query: Installer says no permission for approved software request.
category_errors.positive: Cause: Application not targeted correctly. Fix: Assigned package properly, installation finished without errors.

category_errors.title: Data restore request
category_errors.predicted_issue_text: Previous version of shared document needed restoration.
category_errors.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The requested data was recoverable from backup or snapshot history. Restoring the prior version returned the missing file.
category_errors.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Backup snapshots not used. Fix: Recovered copy from backup and placed back in shared folder.
category_errors.query: Previous version of shared document needed restoration.
category_errors.positive: Cause: Backup snapshots not used. Fix: Recovered copy from backup and placed back in shared folder.

worst_issue_matches.title: Offboarding request follow-up
worst_issue_matches.predicted_issue_text: New hire missing email, VPN, and ERP app access.
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The onboarding workflow had not fully completed a downstream provisioning task. Re-running the workflow restored the missing access. A secondary issue related to phishing_report was also reported.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Identity workflow did not finish pushing all entitlements. Fix: Reran provisioning task.
worst_issue_matches.query: New hire missing email, VPN, and ERP app access.
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: Identity workflow did not finish pushing all entitlements. Fix: Reran provisioning task.

worst_issue_matches.title: Remote access issue
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The VPN client was using an outdated or expired profile. Updating the VPN configuration restored remote access.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Outdated VPN client profile. Fix: Updated the profile and reconnected.
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: Outdated VPN client profile. Fix: Updated the profile and reconnected.

worst_issue_matches.title: Service-to-service API error
worst_issue_matches.predicted_issue_text: API response format changed, breaking downstream parser.
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The API failure was caused by an upstream contract change that the client service was not prepared for. Updating the client handling restored the integration.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: API response payload change from upstream broke downstream parser. Fix: Update downstream service to match upstream response format.
worst_issue_matches.query: API response format changed, breaking downstream parser.
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: API response payload change from upstream broke downstream parser. Fix: Update downstream service to match upstream response format.

worst_issue_matches.title: New hire access missing
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: Provisioning was incomplete because one automated entitlement step had stalled. Restarting that task completed the user setup.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: provisioning task queued. Fix: re-ran provisioning task.
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: provisioning task queued. Fix: re-ran provisioning task.

worst_issue_matches.title: Peripheral issue
worst_issue_matches.predicted_issue_text: Keyboard and mouse keep disconnecting from the dock.
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: Monitor and USB drops were traced to stale dock firmware. Refreshing the firmware restored stable peripheral connections.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Outdated docking station firmware. Fix: Updated docking station firmware, peripherals stayed connected.
worst_issue_matches.query: Keyboard and mouse keep disconnecting from the dock.
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: Outdated docking station firmware. Fix: Updated docking station firmware, peripherals stayed connected.

worst_issue_matches.title: Data restore request
worst_issue_matches.predicted_issue_text: Previous version of shared document needed restoration.
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The requested data was recoverable from backup or snapshot history. Restoring the prior version returned the missing file.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Backup snapshots not used. Fix: Recovered copy from backup and placed back in shared folder.
worst_issue_matches.query: Previous version of shared document needed restoration.
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: Backup snapshots not used. Fix: Recovered copy from backup and placed back in shared folder.

worst_issue_matches.title: Possible phishing message
worst_issue_matches.predicted_issue_text: Received a suspicious email about payroll or invoice review.
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: Security review confirmed the message was malicious sender impersonation. The email was removed and similar messages were blocked.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Sender impersonation from outside the organization. Fix: Message confirmed as phishing and removed from mailboxes; no compromise steps required because user did not click link.
worst_issue_matches.query: Received a suspicious email about payroll or invoice review.
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: Sender impersonation from outside the organization. Fix: Message confirmed as phishing and removed from mailboxes; no compromise steps required because user did not click link.

worst_issue_matches.title: Internet access blocked
worst_issue_matches.predicted_issue_text: Browser cannot connect to proxy server
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The browser issue was caused by stale proxy settings on the endpoint. Reapplying the correct network configuration resolved the problem.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Proxy settings misconfigured. Fix: Corrected proxy settings and external browsing works again.
worst_issue_matches.query: Browser cannot connect to proxy server
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: Proxy settings misconfigured. Fix: Corrected proxy settings and external browsing works again.

worst_issue_matches.title: Authenticator app issue
worst_issue_matches.predicted_issue_text: Two-factor login failing on phone app.
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: Second-factor verification was failing because the enrolled authenticator had drifted out of sync. Resetting MFA resolved the issue.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Device token out of sync with identity platform. Fix: Reset MFA enrollment and re-register authenticator app.
worst_issue_matches.query: Two-factor login failing on phone app.
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: Device token out of sync with identity platform. Fix: Reset MFA enrollment and re-register authenticator app.

worst_issue_matches.title: Cannot log in
worst_issue_matches.predicted_issue_text: Account locked due to repeated failed sign-ins.
worst_issue_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: Authentication logs showed a lockout state. The account was unlocked and sign-in access was restored. The user expressed urgency during the conversation.
worst_issue_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Repeated failed sign-ins. Fix: Account unlocked by IT support.
worst_issue_matches.query: Account locked due to repeated failed sign-ins.
worst_issue_matches.positive: Cause: Repeated failed sign-ins. Fix: Account unlocked by IT support.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Suspicious email reported
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_issue_text: Reported suspicious email asking for credentials.
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The reported email was phishing and was quarantined. Because the user did not click or submit credentials, the account did not require recovery steps.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Sender impersonation from outside. Fix: Quarantined message and blocked similar patterns.
worst_resolution_matches.query: Reported suspicious email asking for credentials.
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Sender impersonation from outside. Fix: Quarantined message and blocked similar patterns.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Outlook keeps asking for password
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_issue_text: Outlook desktop client keeps prompting for password
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: The issue came from an outdated Outlook credential cache. After clearing cached credentials and re-adding the account, email access returned.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.
worst_resolution_matches.query: Outlook desktop client keeps prompting for password
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.

worst_resolution_matches.query: Outlook desktop client not loading mailbox
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Cached credentials issue. Fix: Clear cached credentials and sign in again.

worst_resolution_matches.title: Workstation keeps rebooting
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_issue_text: Workstation reboots with blue screen before sign-in.
worst_resolution_matches.ground_truth_resolution_summary: System instability came from a recent driver package on the endpoint. Reverting that driver resolved the blue-screen failures.
worst_resolution_matches.predicted_resolution_summary: Cause: Faulty driver update. Fix: Removed bad driver and applied approved version.
worst_resolution_matches.query: Workstation reboots with blue screen before sign-in.
worst_resolution_matches.positive: Cause: Faulty driver update. Fix: Removed bad driver and applied approved version.
